title: dendranthema lavandulifolium var. glabriusculum
intro: Dendranthema lavandulifolium var. glabriusculum, also known as a variety of Chrysanthemum or Dendranthema, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Dendranthema lavandulifolium var. glabriusculum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and improve digestive health, among other benefits. Dendranthema lavandulifolium var. glabriusculum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
